start_prompt: How would you like to forge your character?
start_warning: ⚠️ **Warning: You already have an active character!** Creating a new one will delete all progress.
no_character: You don't have an active character. Use /start first!
no_story_state: ⚠️ No story state found. Please use `/start` to create your character first.
story_missing: ⚠️ Your story state is missing. Try running `/story` to initialize it.
recap_empty: Your history is empty. Start your /story!
resume_footer: Use /story to progress | /recap to see your history
modal_action_placeholder: e.g. I try to ask the barkeep about the rumors...
hunt_no_monsters: ⚠️ No monsters found in the world. Try again later!
hunt_victory: 🏆 Victory! You defeated the **{monster}** and earned **{xp} XP**!
hunt_defeat: 💀 Defeat! You were struck down and lost **{xp} XP**. You wake up fully healed.
hunt_escape: 💨 The battle dragged on and the monster escaped!
hunt_deserter_warning: ⚠️ Deserter Curse active! The monster is empowered.
character_created: 🎉 Welcome **{name}** the {cls}! You have embarked on a **{world}** adventure.
destiny_sealed: 🎉 Destiny sealed! Welcome **{name}** the {cls} to the **{world}** universe.
rest_already_full: ✨ You are already at full health! No need to rest.
combat_narrative_victory: The {monster} fell before {name}. After {rounds} rounds of fierce combat, the creature lay defeated, and {name} stood victorious — {hp} HP remaining.
combat_narrative_defeat: The {monster} overwhelmed {name}. Despite a valiant effort across {rounds} rounds, {name} was struck down, losing consciousness near {location}.
combat_narrative_escape: The {monster} fought {name} for {rounds} grueling rounds before slipping away into the dark. The creature escaped, leaving {name} exhausted but unbroken.
no_session_detail: You don't have an active story session. Use `/start` to create your character and begin your adventure!
session_error: ⚠️ Something went wrong loading your session. Please try again or create a new character with `/start`.
item_inventory_full: 🎒 Inventory full ({max} items)! **{item}** was not picked up.
coop_in_development: ⛏️ **Feature in development!** The co-op multiplayer system is coming soon. Stay tuned!
